name: 05_mc_absent_does_not_arm_when_already_triggered
description: When the position is already triggered (is_triggered=True), the fail-open arming must NOT flip armed=True. Arming a triggered position is a scope error and would corrupt state.

expected.derivation: is_triggered=True: the arming block must respect `and not is_triggered` guard. A triggered position does not arm retroactively. mc_absent fail-open is only for unarmed, un-triggered positions.
